tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: Mina and Jae are inviting me to Echo tonight, but I'm only 60% done with my midterm review. Going out now would cost me significant study time.
Midterm progress improved to 0.78, but I missed the club window and Mina is leaving now. With low energy and high stress, studying further seems most viable tonight.
Studying for an hour improved my progress to 0.89, but with low energy and missed club time, I should stop now to rest.
I slept 8 hours and feel fully recharged with zero sleep debt. This resolves my previous low-energy constraint, making it possible to finish my midterm review tonight.
Midterm is complete and begins now. With full energy and zero sleep debt, I am ready to attend the exam without further study.
